concepts.title: Equation of the pair of tangents
concepts.conceptBody:
Equation of the pair of tangents 

The equation of the pair of tangents drawn from a point $\text{P}\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},{{\text{y}}_{1}} \right)$ to the hyperbola $\frac{{{\text{x}}^{2}}}{{{\text{a}}^{2}}}-\frac{{{\text{y}}^{2}}}{\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }{{\text{b}}^{2}}}=1$ is $\mathbf{S}{{\mathbf{S}}_{1}}={{\mathbf{T}}^{2}}$ , where $\text{S}\equiv \frac{{{\text{x}}^{2}}}{{{\text{a}}^{2}}}-\frac{{{\text{y}}^{2}}}{\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }{{\text{b}}^{2}}}-1,\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ S}\equiv \frac{\text{x}_{1}^{2}}{{{\text{a}}^{2}}}-\frac{\text{y}_{1}^{2}}{\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }{{\text{b}}^{2}}}-1$ and $\text{T}\equiv \frac{\text{x}{{\text{x}}_{1}}}{{{\text{a}}^{2}}}-\frac{\text{y}{{\text{y}}_{1}}}{\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }{{\text{b}}^{2}}}-1$
